text:
Description: Friction is an open-source, vector-based application designed for creating web animations and videos.
Github: https://github.com/friction2d/friction
Homepage: https://friction.graphics/
Releases: https://github.com/friction2d/friction/releases
Latest release: https://github.com/friction2d/friction/releases/tag/v0.9.4
Release notes: https://friction.graphics/releases/friction-094.html
Prereqs: https://github.com/friction2d/friction#system-requirements
Building: https://friction.graphics/documentation/source-linux.html
